sanitization_method: Redact secrets, identifiers, unnecessary internal host details, raw account IDs, and personal data; preserve command/output semantics.
provenance_method: Record source repository, commit SHA, source path, capture command/context, and generation date in a provenance JSON sidecar.
hash_method: Compute SHA-256 for source and public-safe copy; list both in hash index/manifest.
